citations.quote:
Meeting Confirmation - 1pm Friday 10th April
From Srebrzynska, Nika <N.Srebrzynska@napier.ac.uk>
Date Wed 08/04/2026 15:23
To Elbushra, Anfal <40805511@live.napier.ac.uk>

Meeting Confirmation - 1pm Friday 10th April
From Srebrzynska, Nika <N.Srebrzynska@napier.ac.uk>
Date Wed 08/04/2026 15:23
To Elbushra, Anfal <40805511@live.napier.ac.uk>

findings.text: Both NAP-SRC-0011 and NAP-SRC-0041 are meeting confirmation emails from Nika Srebrzynska to Anfal Elbushra, dated 8 April 2026, for a meeting on 10 April 2026 at Bainfield Reception.
The extracted text of both sources has identical SHA-256 hash (8c8185998bc10ffa5129fa940ee73a7f153b2d0037d5a6c5fe46308b459ca176), confirming the textual content is exactly the same.
The PDF files have different SHA-256 hashes (b2a586fd... vs 1e4855d6...), indicating separate file copies despite identical content.
NAP-SRC-0011 and NAP-SRC-0041 are duplicate sources of the same email, likely imported as separate file copies.

proposed_artifacts.content:
{
  "dedup_pair": ["NAP-SRC-0011", "NAP-SRC-0041"],
  "dedup_verdict": "confirmed_duplicate",
  "retained_source_id": "NAP-SRC-0011",
  "suppressed_source_id": "NAP-SRC-0041",
  "evidence": "Identical extracted text SHA-256 (8c818599...). Both are meeting confirmation emails from Nika Srebrzynska to Anfal Elbushra, 8 Apr 2026, for 10 Apr 2026 meeting. PDF SHA-256 differ (b2a586fd vs 1e4855d6) indicating separate file copies.",
  "action": "Suppress NAP-SRC-0041 as duplicate; retain NAP-SRC-0011 as canonical. Update file inventory and chain of custody records."
}
proposed_artifacts.title: Dedup Report for NAP-SRC-0011 and NAP-SRC-0041

proposed_tasks.instructions: Based on dedup report, suppress NAP-SRC-0041 as duplicate of NAP-SRC-0011. Update file inventory, chain of custody records, and any evidence maps to reflect retention of NAP-SRC-0011 as canonical. Confirm no other references to NAP-SRC-0041 remain active.
proposed_tasks.title: Resolve duplicate sources NAP-SRC-0011 and NAP-SRC-0041

risk_flags.text: Duplicate sources may cause confusion in evidence mapping and chain of custody if not resolved.

summary: NAP-SRC-0011 and NAP-SRC-0041 are duplicate sources. Both are meeting confirmation emails from Nika Srebrzynska to Anfal Elbushra dated 8 April 2026 for a 10 April 2026 meeting at Bainfield Reception. Extracted text is identical (same SHA-256). File sizes differ (163066 vs 163066 bytes) but SHA-256 of PDFs differ, suggesting separate file copies of the same email. Recommend deduplication and retention of one canonical copy.

uncertainties.text: The reason for two separate PDF copies (different SHA-256) is unknown; they may be from different email exports or system saves.
